emails.subject: new org regions
emails.body: new org regions Can you please change the org regions for the attached books. Thanks Kam

emails.subject: RE: new org regions
emails.body: RE: new org regions Kam, I will update the regions for the books. Also please advise which gas book is for future and which one is for the options. Same for commodity Crude, Unleaded, and Heating Oil (the future options books for these 3 commodities could be the same and could be different. But currently you only have 1 book set up for each of these 3 commodities). Cecilia

emails.subject: RE: new org regions
emails.body: RE: new org regions All regions have been created and changed in estermtp database. Cecilia

emails.subject: FW: new org regions
emails.body: Kam, Jeremy was asking me about those "Financial" regions... Do you want to use uppercase instead of lowercase so that they are consistent with Global (All uppercase in Global)? Let me know, thanks. Cecilia

emails.subject: RE: new org regions
emails.body: Yes, I didn't realize it mattered. All caps. Thanks

emails.subject: RE: new org regions
emails.body: Any updates on these issues? Need to have the Canada P/B/I books details and also which book is for future and options. We need this info before we can set up books in Netco production database. Cecilia

emails.subject: RE: new org regions
emails.body: I put in a book request for the canada books two days ago. I will check with John Valdes to see what the hold up is. As far as the futures and options books, there should be one book for both. If you have questions about that can you please call Errol McLaughlin directly? Those are his books and I don't know how they need to be set up. Thanks Kam x3-5781
